water.name: Kent Lake tributaries
aliases: Lagunitas Creek tributaries above Kent Lake

authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(68) — Kent Lake tributaries (Marin Co.)
sources.quotedText: (68) Kent Lake tributaries (Marin Co.). Sat. preceding Memorial Day through Sep. 30. 2 trout. 4 trout in possession.

sources.title: 2026 California Freshwater Sport Fishing Regulations (updated June 1, 2026)
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Reservoir layer record for gaz_id 1663440, "Kent Lake", Marin County, CA
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":1663440,"gaz_name":"Kent Lake","gaz_featureclass":"Reservoir","fcode":43600,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"Marin"}; geometry (Web Mercator -13659396.2223, 4578944.8317) converts to lon -122.704444, lat 37.996595, matching the file's recorded coordinate (-122.7044, 37.9966) to within ~10m. Used as the anchor point for Kent Lake tributaries (no single GNIS stream record covers this collective tributary group); a second Kent Lake reservoir record exists at gaz_id 226521 near the dam/south end of the lake (lon -122.693500, lat 37.983726) but was not used as the anchor since gaz_id 1663440 sits at the lake's upper (Lagunitas) end, adjacent to the tributary mouths.

regulations.humanSummary: Open Saturday preceding Memorial Day through September 30
regulations.verbatimText: Sat. preceding Memorial Day through Sep. 30.

parameters.counting_rule: 2 trout daily bag limit; 4 trout in possession.

regulations.humanSummary: 2 trout daily bag limit, 4 trout in possession

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
